Find your studio

Four branches across Jaipur. One online, everywhere.

Every branch teaches to the same standard — same syllabus, same exam path, same care. Pick the one closest to home, or learn live online from anywhere in the world.

Not sure which branch suits you?

Tell us your locality and the student's age on WhatsApp — we'll recommend the nearest branch and batch timing in one reply.

Ask us which branch fits

One message is all it takes — tell us who's learning and which branch suits you, and we'll take it from there.
